scope_note: Brown University does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution on the cited official pages used here. The policy section stays official; the estimate card below is third-party and directional.
policy_summary: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

what_mit_does_say.claim: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

recommended_gpa.summary: Brown does not publish HS GPA data for its incoming class on the cited official pages. The estimate below is a third-party directional reference, not an official Brown cutoff.

estimates.label: Weighted (estimate)
estimates.method: Estimated by PrepScholar because the university did not officially report an average incoming high-school GPA on the cited admissions pages.

recommended_gpa.interpretation: This estimate points to near-straight-A grades in a demanding curriculum. Brown's official pages should still be treated as the policy source; the estimate is only a directional reference.
